title: [FIRParser] Parse type alias
body:
This adds FIR parser support for type alias. Type alias for non-base types will be inlined. 

```
circuit Top:
  type Complex = { real: SInt<10>, imag: SInt<10> }
  type ProbeComplex = Probe<Complex>
  module Top:
    output out: ProbeComplex
```

```
 firrtl.module @Top(out %out: !firrtl.probe<alias<Complex, bundle<real: sint<10>, imag: sint<10>>>>) {
 ...

```
